mapper.sql: c.id ,u.username ,kakao_user_id, AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(u.phone_number), 'tb_mbm_user') phoneNumber ,p.user_id ,c.point_id ,c.bank_code ,GET_CODE_NAME('bank_code', c.bank_code) AS bankName ,c.account_no ,c.account_name ,c.amount ,c.req_date ,c.status ,GET_CODE_NAME('point_cash_status', c.status) AS statusName ,c.memo ,c.create_date ,c.create_id ,GET_WEB_USER_NM(c.create_id) AS createName ,c.modified_date ,c.modified_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(c.modified_id) AS modifiedName

where.if: AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.kakao_user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM tb_mbm_user u INNER JOIN tb_mbm_point p ON u.id = p.user_id INNER JOIN tb_mbm_point_cash c ON p.id = c.point_id

SELECT
FROM tb_mbm_user u INNER JOIN tb_mbm_point p ON u.id = p.user_id INNER JOIN tb_mbm_point_cash c ON p.id = c.point_id WHERE c.id = #{searchCashId}
